rules: H1 must not exceed text-5xl, use tracking-tight.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
Overlines, metadata, and tags must use IBM Plex Mono, uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Body text should use leading-relaxed for reading comfort and text-lg or text-xl in the dictation canvas.
Containers with borders must have generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to avoid collision.
Hero dictation screen must have a constrained max-width (max-w-3xl) and massive vertical margins (py-24 mx-auto) to focus the writer.
Dashboard uses a grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4 layout with gap-6.
Optical alignment is critical: Left-align paragraphs, forms, and dense content.
Avoid glassmorphism completely. Use flat solid backgrounds to evoke a physical paper and ink feel.
Cards and containers should have flat borders (1px solid border-[#E3DFD8]) and zero box-shadow.
Max border-radius is rounded-sm (2px to 4px). Sharp edges (rounded-none) are heavily preferred to mimic paper.
Header must have a solid background (bg-[#FAF9F5]) and a hard 1px bottom border.
Buttons: Flat, text color white on dark background (bg-[#1C1B19]), hover state bg-[#383632] hover:text-white.
Inputs/Textareas: bg-transparent, border-b only or subtle full border, rounded-none.
Modals: Flat, sharp corners, backdrop uses a solid dark scrim (bg-black/60) with no blur.
Tags/Pills: Flat background (bg-[#F2EFEB]), small monospace font, subtle border.
Hover states must transition color/opacity smoothly (transition-colors duration-200).
Use smooth fade-ins for dictation transcript reveals.
Keep animations functional. Use a subtle pulse animation for the active recording/dictation indicator.

images.description: Vintage typewriter on a desk for the login/signup split screen.
Subtle paper texture to be used at very low opacity on the dictation canvas or dashboard background if needed.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='record-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette to maintain the literary, paper-like aesthetic.
The dictation interface is the core feature. Ensure it is distraction-free, visually distinct, and centers the text beautifully using the specified typography.
Customize all Shadcn components to remove the default rounded corners and soft shadows (the Vercel-look). Use sharp edges and flat borders.
Do not use placeholder text for logos or images. Only use the provided media URLs.
Implement the writing interface as a 'Hero' experience: large legible text, plenty of breathing room, and a clear minimal visual hierarchy.
All .js files must adhere to this design system. Overwrite Shadcn default tailwind config with the colors and fonts provided.
